Create OAuth client ID

A client ID is used to identify a single app to Google's OAuth servers. If your app runs on multiple platforms, each will need its own client ID. See Setting up OAuth 2.0 for more information. Learn more about OAuth client types.

Desktop app
The name of your OAuth 2.0 client. This name is only used to identify the client in the console and will not be shown to end users.

Note: It may take 5 minutes to a few hours for settings to take effect

, Navigate the tree grid rows with the up and down arrow keys. Right and left arrow keys to expand or collapse rows, if available. Right arrow key to navigate data within expanded or non-expandable row. Enter key to interact with cell. Tab to navigate inside cell. Escape to exit cell.
